  "findings": [
    "Proposed installation shortcut lacks manufacturer listing verification and submittal documentation.",
    "Potential violation of NEC 110.3(B) regarding installation and use of listed equipment in accordance with instructions.",
    "Risk of violating NEC 408 panelboard requirements and 200.4 neutral conductor grouping rules if shortcut is executed without approved submittals."
  ],
  "actions": [
    "Halt the shortcut installation immediately.",
    "Request the missing product listing page and project notes from the manufacturer or engineer of record.",
    "Verify compliance with NEC 110.26 working clearances and NEC 200.4 neutral grouping before proceeding with makeup."
  ],
  "rationale": "A shortcut cannot be approved during the in-progress stage without the complete product listing and submittal documentation. Proceeding without this verification violates NEC 110.3(B) and risks creating a non-compliant installation that will fail final inspection.",
  "references": [
    "NEC Article 408",
    "NEC Section 110.3(B)",
    "NEC Section 110.26",
    "NEC Section 200.4"
  ]
}
